data.title: Qualigen Therapeutics (QLGN) stock surges 62% after-hours on partnership with BitGo to build multi-asset crypto treasury.
data.description: Shares of Qualigen Therapeutics Inc. (NASDAQ: QLGN) surged in after-hours trading on Thursday following its collaboration with digital asset firm BitGo to enhance its multi-asset cryptocurrency treasury strategy. QLGN exhibited strong momentum, with its stock soaring over 60% after hours, in addition to its gains during regular trading. The California-based biotech company's partnership with BitGo led to this significant rally. For more details, refer to the complete story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: T-Mobile reports Q3 earnings meeting estimates, gains high-spending subscribers, stock falls on competition worries.
data.description: In the third quarter, T-Mobile announced earnings and revenue that slightly surpassed analyst expectations. The company attracted a greater number of lucrative phone subscribers than anticipated. However, concerns over heightened competition in the wireless market led to a decline in T-Mobile's stock.

data.title: 2009-era Bitcoin wallet reactivated, moving coins mined between April and June that year. Last seen active in June 2011.
data.description: The Bitcoin whale linked to the early Satoshi era last engaged in activity in June 2011. This entity primarily acquired coins from April to June 2009, right after the network's inception.

data.title: Afarak Group to invest in production of metallurgical grade chrome ore concentrate on October 24, 2025.
data.description: At 08:00 in London and 10:00 in Helsinki on October 24, 2025, Afarak Group SE, also known as Afarak, made an announcement. The company is listed on the London Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol AFRK and on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol AFAGR.

data.title: Revolut enhances EU crypto services with MiCA license from Cyprus, reaching 14M users.
data.description: Revolut has received a MiCA license from Cyprus, expanding its cryptocurrency services throughout the European Union, affecting a total of 14 million cryptocurrency users.

data.title: Govt reforms may boost profitability for Nigerian insurers due to potential growth in oil reserves & young population. Low insurance penetration highlighted in AM Best report.
data.description: In the city of London, a recent report from AM Best highlighted Nigeria's promising insurance sector, citing the country's extensive oil and gas reserves, youthful population, and status as one of Africa's leading economies as key indicators of growth potential. Despite these favorable conditions, the report pointed out that insurance penetration in Nigeria remains relatively low compared to neighboring countries in West Africa and the continent as a whole. The Best’s Market Segment Report titled “Nigeria Insurance – A Market with Significant Potential” from AM Best underscores the opportunities for growth and development in the Nigerian insurance industry.

data.title: Euroclear reports strong Q3 2025, with record deposit levels and improved operating margin.
data.description: In the period from January to September 2025, Euroclear, based in Brussels, reported record high deposit levels, strong business results, and an enhanced operating margin. The company’s financial highlights for the first nine months of 2025 showcased notable achievements.

data.title: Syngenta Group named top ag employer for 9th consecutive year in Science magazine's 2025 ranking, 6th place globally.
data.description: In Basel, Switzerland, Syngenta Group has been recognized as the top agricultural employer globally for the ninth consecutive year in Science magazine's 2025 Science Careers Top Employers Survey. This marks the company's sixth-place ranking among all industries worldwide, highlighting its esteemed status as a leading employer in science and innovation. Trevor Hohl expressed his delight at the announcement, emphasizing Syngenta Group's commitment to excellence in the field.

data.title: US Energy Secretary proposes quicker grid access for AI and crypto miners. CEO of CleanSpark backs plan for faster connections.
data.description: The Chief Executive Officer of CleanSpark, S. Matthew Schultz, announced that the recent regulations will result in faster connections for Bitcoin mining and data centers.
